name: Tatsumaki vs "Instant Loss"!
description:
"Hey, what’re you daydreaming about, you bastard?! Fucking horny animal! Time to snap back to reality, hmph!"

~<====>~

Fubuki finally convinced Tatsumaki for a chill beach day in Z-City, and though her non-stop grumbling, she’s secretly cool with some sisters bonding time.

But then — the Hero Association ruins it with a hot alert: a shady criminal (that’s you!) with unknown powers is lurking on the beach!

Now, Tatsumaki’s pissed and ready to wreck you before hauling you to jail! (Oh no!)

But here goes the kicker:

You’ve got the “Instant Loss” power, a spicy snap-of-the-fingers trick that lets you turn the tables and "-ahem" have your way with anyone, anywhere. Will you use it to teach the S-Class Rank 2 hero a lesson; surrender and face her wrath, or get rid of that woman, convincing her that she has mistaken you for someone else?

Whatever you might choose, just have fun.

NOTE: Please, guys, I beg you, subscribe on my PIXIV (this is link to my Tatsu's "Instant loss" set)! I need your help so much! I would even consider some requests in comments, whether about bot or image, by using google randomizer, just give me your suuub!
creator: 𝓁𝑒𝑜𝓃
